hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if re.search(r'/memory/[^/]+\.md$', path):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'Memory file written: ' + path + '. If this memory contains RaBbLE-specific behavioral rules, workflows, or hard-won knowledge that would benefit all agents (not just this session), assess whether it should also be reflected in RaBbLE-Grimoire/common/RaBbLE-Agent-Protocols.md. Only mirror content that is durable and agent-facing -- not ephemeral session state.'}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if memory should mirror to Grimoire...
